label: Highest Utilization
description: Top-N limits ranked by utilisation percentage with limit bars and breach highlighting.

0.1.note: — WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets.

0.5.note: — no direct lib/mocks imports in widget file.

0.7.note: applied — moved empty guard to early return (was inline conditional inside JSX, now proper early return).

0.8.note: applied — added hasError -> rose-400 message guard.

l0.notes: 0.1 pass — WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets. 0.2 pass — requiredEntitlements: [execution-basic, execution-full]. 0.3 pass — availableOn: [risk]. 0.4 pass — no any types or @ts-ignore. 0.5 pass — no direct lib/mocks imports in widget file. 0.6 fix applied — added isLoading -> Spinner guard. 0.7 fix applied — moved empty guard to early return (was inline conditional inside JSX, now proper early return). 0.8 fix applied — added hasError -> rose-400 message guard. 0.9 pass — no dead code.

1.1.note: — reads sortedLimits exclusively from useRiskData() hook.

1.2.note: — use-risk-page-data.ts calls useGlobalScope(); riskLimits filtered by scopeStrategyIds; sortedLimits derived from filtered riskLimits.

1.3.note: — org filter changes scopeStrategyIds which filters strategy-level limits.

1.7.note: — no reference data in widget file.

l1.notes: 1.1 pass — reads sortedLimits exclusively from useRiskData() hook. 1.2 pass — use-risk-page-data.ts calls useGlobalScope(); riskLimits filtered by scopeStrategyIds; sortedLimits derived from filtered riskLimits. 1.3 pass — org filter changes scopeStrategyIds which filters strategy-level limits. 1.4 pass — clientIds threaded through getStrategyIdsForScope. 1.5 pass — strategyIds threaded through getStrategyIdsForScope. 1.6 pass — empty scopeStrategyIds returns unfiltered limits. 1.7 pass — no reference data in widget file.

findings: L0.6: Added isLoading -> Spinner guard (was missing)
L0.7: Promoted inline empty conditional to proper early return for clarity
L0.8: Added hasError -> error message guard (was missing)
